strDesc: A bottom-tier 24-hour Ayotimiwa Ship Breaking Co. Salvage Permit. Unexpired permits allow scavengers to salvage derelicts in the OKLG Boneyard without interference from Ayotimiwa Security.
A low-tier 7-day Ayotimiwa Ship Breaking Co. Salvage Permit. Unexpired permits allow scavengers to salvage derelicts in the OKLG Boneyard without interference from Ayotimiwa Security.
A mid-tier 30-day Ayotimiwa Ship Breaking Co. Salvage Permit. Unexpired permits allow scavengers to salvage derelicts in the OKLG Boneyard without interference from Ayotimiwa Security.
A high-tier 3-month Ayotimiwa Ship Breaking Co. Salvage Permit. Unexpired permits allow scavengers to salvage derelicts in the OKLG Boneyard without interference from Ayotimiwa Security.
A premium-tier 12-month Ayotimiwa Ship Breaking Co. Salvage Permit. Unexpired permits allow scavengers to salvage derelicts in the OKLG Boneyard without interference from Ayotimiwa Security.
